lyrics.text: You lit the fire
lyrics.translation: 你燃起了火焰

lyrics.text: Then drank the water
lyrics.translation: 却把水喝光

lyrics.text: You slammed that door
lyrics.translation: 你破门而去

lyrics.text: And left me standing all alone
lyrics.translation: 剩我形单影只

lyrics.text: We wrote the story
lyrics.translation: 我们共同写就了这故事

lyrics.text: We turned the pages
lyrics.translation: 我们经历无数沧桑变化

lyrics.text: You changed the end
lyrics.translation: 你却改变了结局

lyrics.text: Like everybody said you would
lyrics.translation: 这结局，旁人竟料定

lyrics.text: I should've seen it coming
lyrics.translation: 我想我早该醒悟

lyrics.text: It should've sent me running
lyrics.translation: 我应该潇洒而去

lyrics.text: That's what I get for loving you
lyrics.translation: 这或许也是我爱你的一种方式

lyrics.text: If I had a time machine
lyrics.translation: 如果我有时光机器

lyrics.text: And if life was a movie scene
lyrics.translation: 如果生活只是一出电影幕剧

lyrics.text: I'd rewind and I'd tell me
lyrics.translation: 我会穿越时空，回溯时光，告诉自己

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃离这无疾而终的爱情

lyrics.text: We were never meant to be
lyrics.translation: 我们永远不可能在一起

lyrics.text: So if I had a time machine
lyrics.translation: 如果我有时光机器

lyrics.text: I'd go back and I'd tell me
lyrics.translation: 我会回到过去，告诉自己

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃吧

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃离这无疾而终的爱情结局

lyrics.text: I got your letters
lyrics.translation: 我收到过你的情书

lyrics.text: I got your words
lyrics.translation: 听过你对我说的甜言蜜语

lyrics.text: I stacked them high
lyrics.translation: 现在，我把他们堆得高高的

lyrics.text: And lit them all and let them burn
lyrics.translation: 一把火之后，只余灰烬

lyrics.text: Your broken stories
lyrics.translation: 你撕碎这美满故事

lyrics.text: Don't mean a thing
lyrics.translation: 但这并不意味着

lyrics.text: You made that bed
lyrics.translation: 它会永不见天日

lyrics.text: Good luck falling back asleep
lyrics.translation: 只当大梦一场，醒来就雨过天晴

lyrics.text: I should've seen it coming
lyrics.translation: 我想我早该醒悟

lyrics.text: It should've sent me running
lyrics.translation: 我应该潇洒而去

lyrics.text: That's what I get for loving you
lyrics.translation: 这或许也是我爱你的一种方式

lyrics.text: If I had a time machine
lyrics.translation: 如果我有时光机器

lyrics.text: And if life was a movie scene
lyrics.translation: 如果生活只是一出电影幕剧

lyrics.text: I'd rewind and I'd tell me
lyrics.translation: 我会穿越时空，回溯时光，告诉自己

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃离这无疾而终的爱情

lyrics.text: We were never meant to be
lyrics.translation: 我们永远不可能在一起

lyrics.text: So if I had a time machine
lyrics.translation: 如果我有时光机器

lyrics.text: I'd go back and I'd tell me
lyrics.translation: 我会回到过去，告诉自己

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃吧

lyrics.text: Run
lyrics.translation: 逃离这无疾而终的爱情结局

lyrics.text: Oh, your love, it got me higher
lyrics.translation: 你的爱让我以为自己登上神坛

lyrics.text: Then it drove me up the wall
lyrics.translation: 你的爱使我跨越过千山万岭

lyrics.text: But the higher up you go
lyrics.translation: 但站得越高

lyrics.text: The further you will fall
lyrics.translation: 摔得越狠

lyrics.text: Ohhh, ohhh, ohhh, run...
lyrics.translation: 快逃吧

lyrics.text: If I had a time machine
lyrics.translation: 如果我有时光机器

lyrics.text: And if life was a movie scene
lyrics.translation: 如果生活只是一出电影幕剧

lyrics.text: I'd rewind and I'd tell me

lyrics.translation: 快逃
